member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.BulkDownload.Api.BulkDownloadController.GetZipByIds(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Download arbitrary items by ID as a ZIP.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.BulkDownload.Api.BulkDownloadController.GetPlaylistZip(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Download a full playlist as a ZIP.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.BulkDownload.Api.BulkDownloadController.GetSeriesZip(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Download a full TV series as a ZIP.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.BulkDownload.Api.BulkDownloadController.GetSeasonZip(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Download a single TV season as a ZIP.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.BulkDownload.Api.BulkDownloadController.GetAlbumZip(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Download a music album or audiobook as a ZIP.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.BulkDownload.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.MaxZipBytes
member.summary: Max total uncompressed bytes per request. 0 = unlimited.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.BulkDownload.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.AllowAllUsers
member.summary: Allow non-admin users to use bulk download.
